fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: glamsterdam-devnet-4 targeting today; Nethermind + ethrex (EL), Prysm/Lodestar/Lighthouse/Nimbus (CL)
EIP-7904 likely removed: all clients hit 100M gas/sec with BAL optimizations; awaiting Geth confirmation (~end of May)

hegota_proposals.highlight: EIP-8188 (State Tiering by Write Age): period metadata on accounts/storage; 78% DB reduction in prototype; PFI'd
EIP-8182 (Private ETH Transfers): UTXO shielded pool as system contract; Groth16/BN254; mixed reception; PFI'd
EIP-4758 (Deactivate SELFDESTRUCT): removes account deletion, retains sendAll; 162 contracts may break; PFI'd to surface objections

bal_updates.highlight: EIP-7702 BAL edge case: delegation address only added if gas/value/stack-depth checks pass; spec updated, tests merged
7702 delegation BAL change deferred from glamsterdam-devnet-4; future inclusion pending client alignment

organizational.highlight: Monday ACDT tentatively canceled (EU/US public holiday); confirm in AllCoreDevs Discord

action_items.action: Review 7702 delegation BAL implementation and weigh in on BAL Discord thread
Review execution-apis cross-client JSON-RPC matrix; flag methods to spec or drop

decisions.decision: 7702 delegation BAL change deferred from glamsterdam-devnet-4; future inclusion to be decided in BAL Discord channel
EIP-7904 likely DFI from Glamsterdam; formal status change deferred until Geth benchmarks confirmed
PFI for Hegota: EIP-8188 (State Tiering), EIP-8182 (Private Transfers), EIP-4758 (Deactivate SELFDESTRUCT)
Monday ACDT tentatively canceled; pending final confirmation in AllCoreDevs Discord
